title: Citrusy Silky Citrusy Penne Stir-fry
description: A citrusy and silky crowd-pleaser Argentine dish featuring penne pasta with a dairy-free-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: 1 cup finely diced pickled vegetables (such as carrots or cucumbers)

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Add the penne pasta and cook according to package instructions until al dente.
In a separate pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add finely chopped red onion and minced garlic; sauté for about 3-4 minutes or until onions are translucent and fragrant.
Add lemon juice, lime juice, zested lemon, salt, and pepper to the pan with the onions and garlic. Let it simmer for a minute or two to release flavors.
Drain cooked penne pasta, reserving some pasta water. Add the drained pasta into the onion-garlic-lemon mixture in the skillet. Stir well to combine.
Add finely diced pickled vegetables to the pan with the pasta and sauce. Continue to stir-fry for an additional 1-2 minutes until all ingredients are evenly coated and heated through.
If desired, add some reserved pasta water to make it more creamy. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
